channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Maresca's Man City vow: I am not a 'copy and paste' coach
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Enzo Maresca has vowed not to be a "copy and paste" coach in his first press conference since succeeding Pep Guardiola as Man City manager.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigerian-American engineer and Harvard University graduate, Yinka Ogunbiyi, has developed HaloBraid, the world’s first braid-assist robot, an innovation designed to reduce the physical demands of hair braiding while significantly cutting appointment times for salons. item.title: WAFCON 2026: Nigeria set for title defence against Malawi
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Nigeria’s Super Falcons will begin the defence of their Women’s Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON) title against Malawi on Sunday in Morocco as they chase a record 11th continental crown.

item.title: Making Bed, Washing Dishes Not Luxury, Makes Men Attractive – Jennifer Lopez
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: American singer and actress Jennifer Lopez has said that genuine acts of kindness and thoughtfulness are far more attractive in a man than wealth or luxury possessions. Speaking in a recent video circulating on social media, Lopez dismissed the notion that expensive cars, designer watches or private

item.title: Jon Bon Jovi Ends Madison Square Garden Concert Early After Falling Ill
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Rock legend Jon Bon Jovi was forced to cut short his concert at Madison Square Garden in New York on Thursday after revealing he was not well enough to continue performing. The 64-year-old singer had been performing the eighth show of his nine-night residency at the iconic venue when he brought the

item.title: Glasgow 2026: Powerlifter Idris Wins Team Nigeria’s Third Gold Medal
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Riluwan Idris has won Team Nigeria’s third gold medal at the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games, claiming the men’s heavyweight para powerlifting title with a massive 208kg lift in Glasgow on Friday. Competing at a body weight of just 86kg, Idris scored 132.8 points to edge out England&#821

item.title: Vietnam is looking to restrict social media for kids; here are the growing number of other countries doing the same
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

item.title: Vitol Paid Out $5.9 Billion to Traders as Profit Halved in 2025
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Commodity trading giant Vitol Group paid out $5.9 billion to its executives and senior staff through share buybacks last year, even as its profits more than halved to $4.2 billion.

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: One person was killed and two others injured after suspected bandits attacked Makoda town in Makoda Local Government Area of Kano State. item.title: Israel, Nigeria strengthen research, technology collaboration
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigeria and Israel deepen collaboration in research, technology, and innovation, expanding partnerships to drive entrepreneurship and economic development.
Read More: https://punchng.com/israel-nigeria-strengthen-research-technology-collaboration/

item.title: Nigeria Focused On Becoming Industrialised Nation, Says Shettima
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Nigeria's Vice President Kashim Shettima urged nations on the continent to brace themselves and maximise the potential of the resources the region harnesses. The post Nigeria Focused On Becoming Industrialised Nation, Says Shettima appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Saudi Arabia strikes Houthi-held Hodeidah, Yemeni group says
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Houthi-controlled foreign ministry warns that the attack will spark further escalation in the Yemeni conflict.

item.title: FDA advisers say six popular peptides can be compounded. Here are the issues they considered.
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: A group of experts, some of whom work in the peptide industry, said the Food and Drug Administration should allow six peptides to be compounded, in a move that could widen access to the popular wellness products for Americans.

item.title: Dollar to Naira Exchange Rate Today, July 24, 2026: Naira records appreciation across official, black markets
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The naira on Friday continued its appreciation against the US dollar at both the official and parallel foreign exchange markets, ending the week on a positive note. Data from the Central Bank of Nigeria, CBN, showed that the naira strengthened further to N1,362.09 per dollar on Friday, up from N1,36

item.title: Trump vows to investigate EU over fining of US tech companies
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The US president says fines against Google, as well as Apple, Meta and Amazon, should be "entirely reversed."

item.title: Guardiola turns down Italy job for family reasons
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Former Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has reportedly declined the opportunity to become the new head coach of the Italian national team, citing family reasons. The post Guardiola turns down Italy job for family reasons appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: MC Oluomo reacts to suspension of NURTW operations in Osun
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The National President of the National Union of Road Transport Workers (NURTW), Musiliu Akinsanya, popularly known as MC Oluomo, has faulted the suspension of the union’s activities in Osun State, insisting that Governor Ademola Adeleke lacks the constitutional authority to take such action. Adeleke

item.title: Oil Prices Volatile as Supply Disruptions Hit Four Global Fronts
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Brent futures surged past $100 a barrel as the conflict in the Middle East widens and Ukraine strikes Russian infrastructure.

item.title: Wall Street Bulls Are Staring Down $100 Oil, Tariffs, AI Angst
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Every bull market has a recurring cast of villains. Oil shocks. Inflation. Rising bond yields. Trade wars. This week, investors had to contend with all of them at once.

item.title: Done Deal: Danish Club FC Midtylland Sign Nigerian Youngster
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Danish club FC Midtylland have completed the signing of Nigerian midfielder, Hassan Momodu Kashietu, Completesports.com reports. Kashietu joins the Black and Reds from Nigerian club FC Ebedei. The 18-year-old midfielder will become part of FC Midtjylland’s U-19 team. Kashietu Eager To Impress
